# start()

**Instance Method**

Starts the session after initializing an instance of SFAuthenticationSession. This will trigger the consent dialog.

## Declaration

```swift
func start() -> Bool
```

## Instance Methods

- **cancel()**: Cancels the currently running session when the consent dialog is up or when the webpage is up. This is how applications stop the login process.
